race.description: Duttons Easy To Do Business With! Hcp (C1)
race.comment: TOBIKKO (3) got too far back from the outside draw but was strong late to grab third. Better for that and if they can settle a bit closer this time he will prove very tough to stop. BRIMARVI ROSEMARIE (11) was well supported first-up at the midweeks but came up just short after settling too far back. Fitter now and draws the A1 and has Holder taking over. Expecting him to be more handy. ZOUTRAIL (14) is knocking on the door and has the peaks to measure up down in the weights. Drawn sticky but gets in light and can play a role. STYLISH FLIPPER (6) has been thereabouts in his two runs back and strips fitter third-up of the quick turnaround. Should get a good run from the low gate with Opperman sticking. LOFTY THOUGHTS (2) returns a gelding and makes his stable debut for the Rae camp. Drawn awfully but looks to have his share of ability. Keeping safe.
